   contain the root `toctree` directive.

BrooksRFIGAN Documentation
==========================

This library is designed to make the job of training a Generative Adversarial Network for flagging Radio Frequency Interference **easy**.

.. note::
   Despite my best efforts, it's still not easy.

.. toctree::
   usage
